Projects

Selected work

Things I've designed and built. Each entry links to a deeper write-up.

Remixfy

AI-powered rap lyrics and beat generation platform. Prompt-based music production with FastAPI backend and React frontend.

  • FastAPI
  • React
  • OpenAI API
  • MusicGen
  • PyTorch
  • Stable Audio

ArgusLens

AI-powered visual analysis system. Uses Grounding DINO and Temporal Transformer for contextual object detection and risk prediction.

  • Python
  • Grounding DINO
  • Temporal Transformer
  • Computer Vision
  • PyTorch

AI Health System

End-to-end AI system for automatic plant disease detection from leaf images using YOLOv8 and EfficientNet-B3 with Grad-CAM explainability.

  • FastAPI
  • YOLOv8
  • EfficientNet-B3
  • Grad-CAM
  • Python
  • PyTorch

AI Coach System

Django-based AI-powered study coach web application integrating Google Gemini API for personalized learning plans.

  • Django
  • Google Gemini API
  • google-genai
  • Python
  • PostgreSQL
